comment.body:
Last couple of days been getting clapped with my trading.

But today I understood her writing and she mentioned likely top at 6007-6018 so I eased my way into some points and held near into her centroid range.

Thanks Alma, need to slowly stack some more Green Days and get better at understanding her content. 🥲❤️🤝
